text:
is a young girl from the Calaneth District. She and her brother witness the departure and comeback of the Scout Regiment on the 57th Exterior Scouting Mission.

Appearance

Ellie is a small girl with big brown eyes and golden hair tied into two ponytails.

Personality

Not many things are known about her personality. She appears to be an innocent and shy girl, which can be seen when Eren Jaeger sees her, making her feeling nervous. Unlike her brother, she seems to be more quiet and calmer, as she did not scream loudly about the Scout Regiment.

Story

The 57th Exterior Scouting Mission arc

Upon the return of the Scout Regiment from their 57th Expedition to reclaim Wall Maria, Ellie and her brother climb a ladder to see the Scouts over the crowd. Mikasa Ackermann and Eren Jaeger notice the siblings watching them and are reminded of how they themselves used to watch the Scouts return from expeditions.
